title: Session 21 — The Assassins’ Escape
bodyText:
**TL;DR: Clean getaway to Varen's place — Felson and Brolin read Root's journal while rumors of his death spread through a confused Koviz; Felson set out for Filbert's house.**

# What happened
- Fly + invisibility + bag carried them over the crowds; back to **[[pc-varen|Varen]]'s place undetected**.
- [[giuseppe|G]] checked in by sending stone.
- **[[pc-felson|Felson]] and [[pc-brolin|Brolin]] read [[root-darkpass|Root]]'s journal** (see [[roots-journal]]) — Sellie and the baby's deaths, [[the-underdark|the Underdark]] dig, the sickness, Tad's mission, and Root's cold assessments of Brolin.
- Felson + [[cumb]] bought **thieving tools from Mr. Spells**; the rest staged a normal breakfast.
- By morning, **rumors of Root's death** were spreading through a confused [[koviz]].
- Felson headed for [[filbert]]'s house.

# Fired / left smoking
- [x] Root's journal read — contents in [[roots-journal]].
- Rumors of Root's death spreading through Koviz.
- Felson en route to [[filbert]]'s house.

# Threads
[[roots-journal]] · [[root-darkpass]] · [[koviz]] · [[filbert]]
